page_content:
BUSI622 Managing Digital Business Markets (2 Credits)

The objective is to understand the strategic and tactical issues

involved in managing digital businesses and markets. Also, some of the characteristics of digital businesses and markets that make them unique

and understand how companies can best manage them will be examined.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Business and Management (Master's); Business and Management (Master's)) ; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.
